intitule: Identification des Phrasal Verbs et des Prépositions

enonce.texte: Identifiez si le mot souligné est un phrasal verb ou une préposition dans chaque phrase.

questions.texte: She <u>looked after</u> her younger brother while her parents were away.
The book is <u>on</u> the table.
He <u>gave up</u> smoking last year.
She has been living here <u>since</u> 2015.
look after
questions.reponse: to take care of someone or something

questions.texte: look into
break down
questions.reponse: to stop working (for a machine) or to lose control emotionally

questions.texte: get into
questions.reponse: to enter or to become interested in something

questions.texte: give up
questions.reponse: to stop trying or to quit something

questions.texte: turn down
questions.reponse: to refuse or to reduce the volume

enonce.texte: Complétez chaque phrase avec le phrasal verb approprié parmi les suivants : look after, look into, break down, get into, give up, turn down, look for, run out of, get along with, put off.

questions.texte: Can you ________ my cat while I'm on holiday?
The police are going to ________ the case.
My car ________ on the highway yesterday.
He ________ smoking because it was affecting his health.
She ________ the job offer because it was too far from her home.

intitule: Utilisation des Prépositions - At, In, On

enonce.texte: Complétez les phrases avec la préposition correcte : at, in, on.

questions.texte: I usually wake up ________ 6:00 AM.
We live ________ Yaoundé.
She was born ________ Monday.
He is ________ the bus right now.
They arrived ________ the airport at 8 PM.
She has lived in Douala ________ 2010.
They have been studying English ________ two years.
He has worked here ________ last January.
We have been waiting ________ three hours.
I haven't seen her ________ we graduated.

intitule: Application des Phrasal Verbs dans un Contexte Camerounais

enonce.texte: Répondez aux questions suivantes en utilisant des phrasal verbs appropriés dans le contexte du Cameroun.

questions.texte: Que faites-vous si votre voiture tombe en panne sur la route ? (Utilisez break down)
questions.reponse: I call a mechanic because my car has broken down.

questions.texte: Que faites-vous si vous ne comprenez pas une situation à l'école ? (Utilisez look into)
questions.reponse: I ask the teacher to look into the problem.

questions.texte: Comment exprimer que vous avez arrêté de fumer ? (Utilisez give up)
questions.reponse: I gave up smoking last year.

questions.texte: Que dites-vous si vous refusez une invitation à une fête ? (Utilisez turn down)
questions.reponse: I turned down the invitation because I was busy.

intitule: Création de Phrases avec des Phrasal Verbs

enonce.texte: Créez des phrases complètes en utilisant les phrasal verbs suivants dans des situations de la vie quotidienne.

questions.texte: Utilisez look after dans une phrase.
questions.reponse: I look after my younger sister when my parents are at work.

questions.texte: Utilisez run out of dans une phrase.
questions.reponse: We ran out of rice, so we went to the market.

questions.texte: Utilisez get along with dans une phrase.
questions.reponse: I get along very well with my classmates.

questions.texte: Utilisez put off dans une phrase.
questions.reponse: They put off the meeting because the manager was absent.

intitule: Dialogue avec des Phrasal Verbs et Prépositions

enonce.texte: Complétez le dialogue suivant en utilisant des phrasal verbs et des prépositions appropriés.

questions.texte: A: 'Can you ________ my bag while I go to the restroom?'
B: 'Sure. But have you ________ your phone? It's ________ the table.'
A: 'Yes, I have it. I'm just ________ the bus to go home.'
B: 'Make sure you don't ________ your bag!'

intitule: Révision des Prépositions - For, Since, During

questions.texte: She has been studying English ________ 2018.
I slept ________ the whole class. I was so tired.
We have known each other ________ ten years.
They visited many places ________ their stay in Cameroon.
He has been a teacher ________ 2005.
